product_overview: REVO is a student-facing vocational recommender that uses an adaptive multi-phase questionnaire and a decision-tree ML model to recommend technical specializations and an action plan. It lets students register, take assessments, view personalized results and track their progress over time while admins can monitor model metrics and manage sessions.
core_goals: Allow students to discover recommended specializations based on an adaptive multi-phase questionnaire
Present a clear REVO Score, visualizations and a 4-step personalized action plan after each assessment
Enable students to track past assessments and visualize their vocational trajectory over time
Let students create accounts, sign in, and access their dashboard and assessment flows
Provide an admin interface to inspect model metrics and trigger retraining or manage sessions

features.name: Landing / Marketing Page
features.description: Public introduction to REVO that orients new visitors and directs them to register or log in.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See product overview and core value proposition -> Choose to register or log in
Navigate to / -> Read brief feature highlights -> Navigate to /register to create an account

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Create a new student account so the user can access assessments and personal history.
user_flows: Navigate to /register -> Fill in name -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit registration form -> See confirmation or redirect to /login
Navigate to /register -> Fill in name -> Fill in email -> Leave password blank -> Submit registration form -> See validation error about missing password

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate existing users so they can access their dashboard, start questionnaires and view results.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit login form -> See /dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in incorrect password -> Submit login form -> See error message about invalid credentials

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Landing space after login where users see their REVO Score, progress and can start a new assessment or view history.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> See current REVO Score and progress toward next level -> Start a new assessment
Navigate to /dashboard -> See recent session summary -> Navigate to /history to review past assessments

features.name: Questionnaire Flow (Adaptive Multi-Phase)
features.description: Three-phase adaptive questionnaire that collects answers to generate a specialization recommendation and archetype.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Start questionnaire -> Navigate to /questionnaire -> Complete Phase 1 pre-calibration (10 questions) -> Complete Phase 2 deepening (selected questions based on Phase 1) -> Complete Phase 3 psychometrics (scenario questions) -> Submit questionnaire -> Navigate to /results -> See that results are available

features.name: Results Viewing
features.description: Display the assessment outcome including REVO Score, predicted specialization probabilities, archetype and a 4-step personalized action plan with suggested courses.
user_flows: Navigate to /results -> View REVO Score and confidence indicators -> View radar and bar visualizations of aptitudes and probabilities -> View 4-step personalized action plan
Navigate to /results -> View recommended courses -> Open recommended course details

features.name: History (Past Sessions)
features.description: List and review past assessments so students can track progress and compare previous REVO Scores and visualizations.
user_flows: Navigate to /history -> See list of past sessions with dates and REVO Scores -> Select a session entry -> View that session's score and trajectory graph
Navigate to /history -> See at least two past session points plotted over time when multiple sessions exist

features.name: Admin Panel
features.description: Admin-facing area to inspect model metrics, review sessions and perform management actions such as triggering model retraining or managing sessions (may require backend integration).
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> View admin controls and lists -> Inspect model metrics (accuracy, F1, tree depth) as presented in the UI
Navigate to /admin -> View sessions list -> Trigger manual model re-training -> See confirmation that the re-training action was initiated in the UI

tech_stack.ui_library: Plain CSS (no major UI framework detected)

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email and password; stores auth state in context
user_interactions: See loading indicator and then dashboard on success
See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Register new account via registration form
user_interactions: See confirmation or redirect to login

features.name: Questionnaire Flow
features.description: Multi-step questionnaire that collects answers and submits for ML scoring

features.name: Results Viewing
features.description: Display results returned by ML service after questionnaire
user_interactions: Click recommended course to open details

features.name: Admin Panel
features.description: UI for admin tasks (may be limited in backend integration)
user_interactions: Perform CRUD-like actions in the UI

known_limitations.issue: Some admin UI features may be UI-only and not fully integrated with backend
known_limitations.impact: Admin actions may only modify local state or require extra backend setup

known_limitations.issue: Endpoints inferred from frontend may have different paths in service implementations
known_limitations.impact: Tests that call backend require correct server base URLs and running services
